YUWANCARD-BLACKSMITH.title: Blacksmith
YUWANCARD-BLACKSMITH.pages.INITIAL.descr:
You enter a [gold]blacksmith's shop[/gold] filled with heat.
[sine]The furnace roars[/sine] as the [gold]blacksmith[/gold] swings their hammer.
They notice you and pause their work:
"Huh?"
YUWANCARD-BLACKSMITH.pages.INITIAL.optio: You have no cards to upgrade.
Choose [blue]2[/blue] cards to [jitter]fuse[/jitter] into a higher rarity card.
You don't have enough fusable cards.
YUWANCARD-BLACKSMITH.pages.UPGRADED.desc:
The blacksmith skillfully upgrades your cards.
"HUH!"
They wave goodbye.
YUWANCARD-BLACKSMITH.pages.FUSED.descrip: The blacksmith throws the two cards into the furnace. Sparks fly, and a brand new card emerges.
YUWANCARD-BLACKSMITH.pages.CANCELLED.des: You decide to leave the blacksmith's shop.
YUWANCARD-BLACKSMITH.pages.FUSE_FAILED.d: The fusion failed. The blacksmith shrugs helplessly.
YUWANCARD-SELF_HELP_BOOK.pages.INITIAL.o: Choose an Attack card to enchant with [blue]Arthropod Killer[/blue].

You search your pockets but find no card suitable for fighting bugs.

The book reads: [green]"Without a sword, stepping on bugs just gets your shoes dirty."[/green]
Choose an Attack card to enchant with [blue]Sweeping Blade[/blue].

You search your pockets but find no card suitable for sweeping.

The book reads: [blue]"Without a sword, sweeping just makes you dizzy."[/blue]
Choose an Attack card to enchant with [blue]Venomous[/blue].

You search your pockets but find no card worth poisoning.

The book reads: [red]"Without a weapon, poison is just a waste."[/red]
YUWANCARD-SELF_HELP_BOOK.pages.ARTHROPOD:
You turn to the Arthropod Killer passage:
[green]"Bugs are many, but they all share one weakness—getting squashed!"[/green]

You learn the tricks for dealing with bugs. An illusion of shattering shells appears on your card.
YUWANCARD-SELF_HELP_BOOK.pages.SWEEPINGB:
You turn to the Sweeping Blade passage:
[blue]"One sword sweeps a thousand enemies! Though you might only need to sweep two or three."[/blue]

A tiny figure swinging a sword is drawn on the page. Your card seems to have learned this momentum.
You turn to the Venomous passage:
[purple]"Poison is the best seasoning—add some spice to your enemy's last meal!"[/purple]

You carefully apply the poison to your card. It begins to glow with an eerie purple light.
YUWANCARD-SELF_HELP_BOOK.pages.INITIAL.o: Choose a card to enchant with [blue]Loyal[/blue].

You search your pockets but find no card worthy of loyalty.

The book reads: [gold]"Without an object of loyalty, loyalty is just empty words."[/gold]
YUWANCARD-SELF_HELP_BOOK.pages.LOYAL.des:
You turn to the Loyal passage:
[gold]"Loyalty is the most precious quality—it will stay by your side forever!"[/gold]

A golden mark appears on your card, as if swearing allegiance to you.
YUWANCARD-HORIZON_EVENT.title: Horizon
YUWANCARD-HORIZON_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.de:
"A bosom friend afar brings a distant land near."

You feel a warm power surrounding you, as if friends from afar are waving to you.
YUWANCARD-HORIZON_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.op: Restore all HP. Gain [blue]10[/blue] Max HP.
YUWANCARD-HORIZON_EVENT.pages.CARD_ADDED:
A card glowing with golden light slowly floats into your hand.

"May this power help you go further."
YUWANCARD-HORIZON_EVENT.pages.HEALED.des:
Warm power flows into your body, and you feel unprecedentedly fulfilled.

"The road ahead is long, take care."
